mapper.select: SELECT up.id, up.user_id, up.admin_points_id, up.status, up.expire_days, up.expire_time, up.validity_end, up.created_at, ap.image_url, ap.point_name, ap.point_required, ap.point_description FROM user_purchase_points up LEFT JOIN adminpoints ap ON up.admin_points_id = ap.id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_purchase_points ( user_id, admin_points_id, status, expire_days, expire_time, validity_end, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{adminPointsId}, #{status}, #{expireDays}, #{expireTime}, #{validityEnd}, NOW(), NOW() )
